meta.title: Quantum Fractal Crystal Computing
meta.description: Quantum fractal crystal computing paradigm — addressed multiscale crystal substrate where unknown is lawful state, crystal stores generators and constraint-outlines, computation pulls solution from void by tightening invariants until unique completion remains

paradigm.thesis: Quantum Fractal Crystal Computing is not a serial search engine. It is an addressed, multiscale crystal substrate where the unknown is treated as a lawful state.
core_principles: The crystal stores generators and constraint-outlines instead of bulk expansions
Computation pulls a solution from the void by tightening invariants until a unique completion remains
Question and answer meet because both are fields on the same crystal — the crystal relaxes toward the lowest-action mutual fit
Desire is the goal-bias / attractor content inside the information term I
Simultaneous search across the entire nested crystal is achieved by constraint propagation, not serial enumeration
paradigm.computation_model: void-pull — tightening invariants until unique completion remains

components.Expl: Exploration value / explanatory compression of candidate

kinetic_term.meaning: Computational effort / instability / cost / wasted motion

net_action.meaning: Quantity to minimize — the crystal relaxes to lowest-action mutual fit

action_law.search_law: X* = argmin_{X ∈ A_Q} A(Q,X) subject to R_Q(X) ≥ ρ

desire_field.formula: D_Q(X) = I(Q,X) = λ_a·Align(Q,X) + λ_e·Expl(X) + λ_z·ZPA(Q,X) + λ_c·ConSat(Q,X)
desire_field.role: Goal-bias / attractor content — formalizes desire as field on crystal

resonance_metric.formula: R_Q(X) = w₁·AddrFit + w₂·InvFit + w₃·Phase + w₄·Boundary + w₅·Scale + w₆·Compress

components.AddrFit: Address fitness — how well X sits in the crystal lattice
components.InvFit: Invariant fitness — how many crystal invariants X preserves
components.Phase: Phase coherence — alignment with crystal's phase structure
components.Boundary: Boundary compliance — respect for shell/wreath boundaries
components.Scale: Scale consistency — proper behavior under RG flow

fields.Addr: Address proof — crystal coordinate where X lands
fields.C: Conservation certificate — which conservation laws preserved
fields.W: Witness data — minimal evidence to verify

desire_compiler.signature: D: U → (Q_U, D_U, O_U, Π_U, Θ_U, G_U)

resonance_scheduler.state_vector: (β_t, F_t, ℓ_t, a_t, P_t, H_t, Z_t)
resonance_scheduler.rotation_trigger: when -E[ΔA]/ΔK < τ_U (expected improvement drops below threshold)

resonance_kernel.tuple: (W_□, W_✿, W_☁, W_◇, T_↔, A_bus, G_witness)

W_□.name: Square worker
W_□.role: Address tightening, constraint enforcement, route closure

W_✿.name: Flower worker
W_✿.role: Spectral stabilization, phase coherence, basis alignment

W_☁.name: Cloud worker
W_☁.role: Posterior sharpening, uncertainty management, collapse control

W_◇.name: Fractal worker
W_◇.role: Multiscale refinement, RG flow, fixed-point testing

resonance_kernel.step_law: (ℓ,a,b) = S_U(S_t), then W_ℓ executes, then bus merges, then status check

steps.name: Inject
steps.action: Receive unknown U into the crystal

steps.name: Propagate
steps.action: Spread desire field through the lattice

steps.name: Sample
steps.action: Draw candidates from crystal using scheduler

steps.name: Rotate
steps.action: Switch lens (S→F→C→R) when improvement drops below threshold

steps.name: Check
steps.action: Test resonance metric R_Q(X) ≥ ρ and all tolerances

steps.name: Commit
steps.action: If check passes, write W_Q and emit solution X*

mathematical_structures.variational_principle: The crystal relaxes toward lowest-action mutual fit between query and candidate
mathematical_structures.gradient_descent: dψ/dt ≈ -∇_ψ A(ψ,t,O_s) — state flows down the action gradient
mathematical_structures.conservation_laws: All 6 conservation laws must hold across crystal transactions
mathematical_structures.symmetry_group: G₁₀₈ crystal symmetry governs admissible states
mathematical_structures.quotient_projection: Π_U reduces symmetry before commit — only the essential structure is stored

sfcr_lenses.mapping: The four resonance kernel workers map 1:1 to SFCR lenses

crystal_addresses.role: QueryState Q embeds as a crystal address via h_Q — every query is a point on Xi108
crystal_addresses.address_proof: CommitWitness Addr(X) ties every solution to a specific crystal coordinate

action_principle.origin: A(ψ,t,O_s) = K - I from corpus action law
action_principle.extension: Desire formalized as I-term components (Align, Expl, ZPA, ConSat)

transport_law.role: T_↔ in the resonance kernel is the inter-worker transport law
transport_law.connection: Maps to metro/corridor system in brain_network

conservation.connection: Links to 6 conservation laws governing brain transactions

hologram.role: HoloAddress seed h_Q anchors query in the holographic structure
hologram.connection: Connects to hologram_rosetta and 108D crystal spec

zero_point.role: ZPA(Q,X) in the desire field links to zero-point attractor physics
zero_point.connection: Maps to z_tunnel_network and resolve_z_point tool
